name: O-3 plugin lifecycle: uninstall-cleanup emits an audit-log JSONL entry when --emit-audit is passed so the action is reconstructable
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro/cache && printf 'x\n' > .claude-tdd-pro/cache/z.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/uninstall-cleanup.sh" --category cache --confirm yes --emit-audit "$PWD/audit.jsonl" 2>/dev/null && grep -q 'category-removed' audit.jsonl && grep -q 'cache' audit.jsonl && echo audited 1>&2
